description: Expected Halmos outcomes for halmos/test/HalmosTest.t.sol. PASS = safe reference must keep passing. FAIL = exploit must stay reproducible (with a counterexample). Any mismatch fails the check: a FAIL-turned-PASS is a lost trophy (halmos or the contract changed), a PASS-turned-FAIL is a regression.

scenarios.name: check_TokenPool_withdraw_noUnderflow
scenarios.why: safe pool: withdraw can never drive balance below its previous value

scenarios.name: check_TokenPoolBuggy_withdraw_noUnderflow
scenarios.why: missing balance check: withdraw underflows the balance

scenarios.name: check_SafeVault_withdraw_shareIntegrity
scenarios.why: safe vault: totalShares tracks totalAssets across withdraw

scenarios.name: check_SafeVault_accounting_multiOp
scenarios.why: safe vault: multi-op accounting keeps totals non-negative

scenarios.name: check_UnbackedMintVault_ownerMint
scenarios.why: owner mint inflates shares without assets: backing violated

scenarios.name: check_BurnDesyncVault_burn
scenarios.why: burn forgets totalShares: shares outgrow assets

scenarios.name: check_ApprovalDrain_allowance_respected
scenarios.why: unchecked allowance math: approve(1) allows draining the full balance

scenarios.name: check_ReentrantVault_backing_violated
scenarios.why: transfer-before-state-update lets the attacker drain without burning shares

scenarios.name: check_FlashLoanPool_repayment_required
scenarios.why: flash loan never checks repayment: pool drained during callback
